discovery_confirm.title: New Device Discovered
discovery_confirm.description:
A new Imou device has been found: {device_name} ({device_id}).

Would you like to add it to Home Assistant?

data_description.enable_discovery: Automatically detect and add new devices from your Imou account. Shows confirmation dialog before adding.
data_description.discovery_interval: How often to check for new devices (default: 3600 seconds / 60 minutes). Range: 300-86400 seconds (5 minutes - 24 hours).

rate_limit_retry.message: API rate limit exceeded, will retry later: {error}

camera_move_location_failed.message: Failed to move camera to location: {error}

no_callback_url.message: No callback URL provided for push notifications
